violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door reach-in. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The ceiling in the dish room by the clean side of the dishwasher was observed with paint peeling and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
